other_observers: Mark Peterson, Bill Maynard and Kara L; found by me
specific_location: Holmes Grove banding station, Casita and Eagle Grove at Chico Basin Ranch
description: A small Dendroica warbler. Gray backed with a blackish tail and 2 white wingbars. White supercilium, black face with a white ear patch. Striking yellow throat. White underparts with blackish streaking on the side.Behaviors: This bird was observed foraging on the ground, on tree trunks and large branches and in the smaller canopy branches of elms, cottonwoods, willows and Russian olives.Call: call a sharp chipPlumage: adult
